name: Dark Scorpion - Chick the Yellow
name_jp: <ruby lang="jp"><rb>黒</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>くろ</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby><ruby lang="jp"><rb>蠍</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>さそり</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby>－<ruby lang="jp"><rb>逃</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>に</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby>げ<ruby lang="jp"><rb>足</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>あし</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby>のチック
desc:
When this card inflicts battle damage to your opponent: You can activate 1 of these effects.
● Target 1 card on the field; return that target to the hand.
● Look at the top card of their Deck, then place it on the top or bottom of the Deck.
mnst_eff:

eff:
When this card inflicts battle damage to your opponent: You can activate 1 of these effects.
● Target 1 card on the field; return that target to the hand.
● Look at the top card of their Deck, then place it on the top or bottom of the Deck.

sets.set: Speed Duel GX: Duelists of Shadows

action: Activates if battle damage is inflicted
Looks at cards from the top of the opponent's Deck
Places cards from the opponent's Deck on the top of the Deck
Places cards from the opponent's Deck on the bottom of the Deck
